title: Hunger and Thirst
description: A 1.21 modpack based on making minecraft hardcore and immersive, inorder to make minecraft scarier.
body:
Hunger and thirst is a modpack for minecraft version 1.21 based on Fabric.
It's made to be hardcore and immersive while not being overly complicated.
**None of the mods are made by me and visiting the creators of the mods is recommended.**


This modpack is only on MODRINTH and if you download from somewhere else its probably a virus.
I don have any ways of financial support and if you see any it isnt me.

Hard mode is forced

![Forced hard mode.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ebeb00fc15802ed9a5f18d78c64a4525f7393d1.png)

Express your gender!

![Gender mod to express yourself!](https://i.pinimg.com/736x/ff/69/30/ff693020c8f9b3d7bf5290a627bc429b.jpg)

Awesome world generation!

![World generation](https://i.pinimg.com/736x/e9/96/b4/e996b4e0ecefad7ab490b7a0e24d09bc.jpg)

Tempature, stamina and more survival mechanics!

![HUD and me freezing to death](https://i.pinimg.com/736x/16/f9/be/16f9bec0c9617c2fc2b387c2cc1a447f.jpg)

Screenshot taken on 12 chunks, optimized to the fullest thanks to Fabulously optimized modpack! (embedded)

![Maximum optimization](https://i.pinimg.com/736x/64/ab/ee/64abeeac2233773b86d5a798c2c68916.jpg)


<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/JCvNJlLSBcw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Used this for the base of the modpack! Its technically a fork ig? (provided the resourcepacks named mod menu helper etc.)
[https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized)

And i think this mod is only on curseforge so it isnt linked!
[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/waddles](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/waddles)

Resourcepack that provides compability between TH and FA which i used, check out the hard work of the owner!

[https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/thfa](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/thfa)
